chapter_title: Type 2 Direct Cause and Effect Based Questions

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Cause: The Government has recently increased its takes on Petrol and diesel by about 10%. Which of the following can be a possible effect of the above cause?

choices.a: The Petroleum companies will reduce the prices of petrol and diesel by about 10%
choices.b: The Petroleum companies will increase the price of petrol and diesel by about 10%
choices.c: The Petroleum companies will increase the prices of petrol and diesel by about 5%
choices.d: The petrol pumps will stop selling petrol and diesel till the taxes are rolled back by the Government

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Effect: Majority of the employees of the ailing organisation opted for voluntary retirement scheme and left the organisation with all their retirement benefits within a fortnight of launching the scheme. Which of the following can be a probable cause of the above effect?

choices.a: The company has been making huge losses for the past 5 yr and is unable to pay salary to its employees in time
choices.b: The management of the company made huge personal gains through unlawful activities
choices.c: One of the competitors of the company went bankrupt last year
choices.d: The company owns large tracts of land in the state which will fetch huge sum of its owners
